creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
gerald      2006-11-05 14:31:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    lang/gcc43           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  And here we go, introducing the lang/gcc43 port in form of the 20061104
  snapshot of GCC 4.3.0; repocopied over from lang/gcc42.
  
  Sadly we now have an unconditional dependency on math/libgmp4 and
  math/mpfr.  On the positive side this allows us to always build the
  Fortran frontend.
  
  PR:             104683
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.289     +9 -17     ports/lang/gcc43/Makefile
  1.178     +18 -18    ports/lang/gcc43/distinfo
  1.9       +2 -2      ports/lang/gcc43/pkg-descr
  1.92      +4 -4      ports/lang/gcc43/pkg-plist
